step_outcomes.1: Git auto-linking (branch name parsing, commit message parsing, webhook endpoint, 43 new tests) + inline context editor with tag inputs and list editors.
step_outcomes.2: Kanban board with @dnd-kit drag-and-drop, optimistic transitions, filter bar, swimlane grouping by epic.
step_outcomes.3: Cmd+K command palette via cmdk: global search across tasks/proposals, keyboard navigation, recent items, quick actions.
step_outcomes.4: Bulk operations (multi-select, batch status/priority/assign), grouping (by epic/assignee/priority, collapsible), URL-based filter state (bookmarkable).
step_outcomes.5: Epic detail page (inline editing, progress bar, task breakdown, milestone/proposal links) + milestone management UI (CRUD, close/reopen, linked epics).
step_outcomes.6: Dashboard enhancements (stacked status bar with tooltips, AI agent activity widget, proposal pipeline funnel), keyboard shortcuts overlay, error retry buttons across all 11 pages.
